violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Additional staff to be certified discussed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). Establishment must manually mix sanitizer until properly adjusted. 3 bay sink was set up during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2026
The following were observed in poor repair: -walk-in cooler gasket -prep unit door gasket -hot holding unit gasket New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
Top pizza belt was observed in poor repair (out of service prior to inspection). PIC in process of replacing piece. Equipment to be properly adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils can opener were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was moved to 3-bay sink at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025

Sausage, and bacon bits were observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit in the left part of the prep-unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. The ambient temperature of the left side of the prep unit was observed at 45 DF. All foods were moved to walk-in cooler at the time of inspection. The middle and right side of the prep unit was observed at 41 DF. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in left side of prep unit until is it able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025
The prep unit gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025
The refuse area was observed with an accumulation of debris. Establishment must maintain refuse area as frequently as needed New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
The 3 bay chemical dispenser was not in good repair. Fixtures must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2023
The tile floor in the back prep area was observed with cracked tile. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024
The lid on the prep unit located in the back prep area was not in good repair. All equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023
